fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Master switch. When off, no Item write triggers any Meta API call.

fields.label: Catalog ID
fields.description: Numeric ID from Meta Commerce Manager (e.g. 1234567890123456)

fields.label: Reuse Token From WhatsApp Account
fields.description: Optional. If set, the access_token of this WhatsApp Account is used (avoids duplicating tokens). Must have catalog_management scope.

fields.label: Meta Access Token
fields.description: System User token with scopes: catalog_management (+ whatsapp_business_management if you also send product messages from here).

fields.label: Meta App Secret (inbound webhook HMAC)
fields.description: Your Meta App's App Secret. Used to verify X-Hub-Signature-256 (HMAC-SHA256 of the raw request body) on inbound order webhooks. Required before pointing Meta's webhook at the connector endpoint. App Dashboard -> App Settings -> Basic -> App Secret.

fields.label: Default Brand
fields.description: Used when Item has no brand.

fields.label: Default Condition
fields.options:
new
refurbished
used
used_like_new
used_good
used_fair

fields.label: Default Visibility
fields.description: staging = synced to the catalog but NOT shown on public Facebook/Instagram (review in Commerce Manager first). published = live to shoppers. Start with staging; flip to published + run Sync All Now when ready, or override per item group in the Category & Condition Mapping below.

fields.label: Default Availability
fields.options:
in stock
out of stock
preorder
available for order
discontinued

fields.label: Price Markup %
fields.description: Optional positive percent added to the REAL selling price (Item Price in the selling price list) before publishing. Default 0 = Meta price matches the live shop exactly.

fields.label: Sync Only Website Items (deprecated)
fields.description: DEPRECATED / no-op. The catalog now always mirrors the storefront gate (Item.publish_on_web=1 AND not disabled), so this flag is ignored. Kept only to avoid a data migration; remove in a later cleanup.

fields.label: Public Image URL Base
fields.description: Public HTTPS prefix Meta can crawl, e.g. https://ventas.docomexico.com. Item.image (relative path) gets prepended with this. If empty, frappe.utils.get_url() is used.

fields.label: Fallback Image URL
fields.description: Used when an Item has no image. Public HTTPS PNG/JPG, square aspect ratio recommended (max 8 MB).

fields.label: Category & Condition Mapping
fields.description: Optional. Map an Item Group to a Facebook condition (e.g. Seminuevos -> refurbished) and/or a google_product_category. Items in unmapped groups use the Default Condition above.
